authorities.title: Integrated acquisition steps treated as reorganization
authorities.body: Revenue Ruling 2001-46 addresses when steps involving a merger subsidiary and target can be integrated and treated as a single reorganization transaction, making it especially useful in multi-step acquisition planning.

authorities.title: Section 382 built-in gain and built-in loss guidance
authorities.body: Notice 2003-65 provides practical approaches for recognized built-in gain and built-in loss determinations under Section 382, making it useful in diligence and post-change modeling.
